Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.

Layered on the AuthFilter framework and the TokenValidator SPI. Wraps Nimbus's oauth2-oidc-sdk (Apache 2.0) for the introspection, flow, and discovery wire shapes.

The Nimbus dependency is declared provided-scope in juneau-rest-server-auth-oauth's POM, so it never bleeds into the dependency tree of an upstream module. Consumers who want OAuth functionality declare com.nimbusds:oauth2-oidc-sdk themselves at runtime.

Key types
  • OAuthIntrospectionValidator — opaque-token validator wrapping Nimbus's RFC 7662 introspection client.
  • OAuthFilter — servlet filter that recognizes Authorization: Bearer ... OAuth tokens.
  • TokenCache — cache SPI used by the validator (and flow helpers); default impl BoundedLruTokenCache.
  • OAuthToken — immutable token record produced by every flow helper.
  • flow — client-side flow helpers (client-credentials, authorization-code with PKCE, refresh-token, and the discouraged resource-owner password-credentials).
  • oidc — OIDC discovery client + metadata record.
See Also:
  • RFC 6749 — OAuth 2.0
  • RFC 7662 — Token Introspection
  • OAuth Auth Support
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
    Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.flow
    OAuth 2.0 client-side flow helpers.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.oidc
    OpenID Connect Discovery 1.0 client.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt
    JWT bearer-token validation backed by com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml
    SAML 2.0 assertion validation for the Juneau REST server, layered on the AuthFilter framework.
  • Class
    Description
    BoundedLruTokenCache
    Thread-safe bounded LRU implementation of TokenCache.
    OAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that authenticates requests carrying an OAuth 2.0 / OIDC access token via the standard RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.
    OAuthFilter.Builder
    Builder.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator
    TokenValidator that validates opaque OAuth 2.0 access tokens via the RFC 7662 Token Introspection endpoint.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    Builder for OAuthIntrospectionValidator.
    OAuthToken
    Immutable record returned by every OAuth 2.0 flow helper on a successful token acquisition.
    TokenCache
    SPI for caching the result of an OAuth introspection or token-acquisition call.
